title: AI will be used to estimate age of asylum seekers from next year
description: LONDON  -  An Artificial Intelligence (AI) age estimation tool that aims to detect adult migrants posing as children will be deployed at the UK’s borders

title: Sink or swim: As an AI wave sweeps China, its workers are adapting fast
description: BEIJING: Shanghai lawyer Xie Jingyi regularly uses artificial intelligence (AI) for work, even though she does not trust it entirely, wary of "hallucinations" or false information presented as fact.
content:
BEIJING: Shanghai lawyer Xie Jingyi regularly uses artificial intelligence (AI) for work, even though she does not trust it entirely, wary of “hallucinations” or false information presented as fact.

title: AI helped a musician with Parkinson’s finish his new album when he could no longer play guitar
description: Artificial intelligence is helping a London-based singer-songwriter continue writing and recording music after Parkinson’s disease largely took away his ability to play guitar.
content:
LONDON – Samuel Smith spent years writing songs with a guitar in his hands.
Now, the London-based singer-songwriter is using artificial intelligence tools to help him continue making Americana music after Parkinson's disease largely took away his abi... [7194 chars]

title: Who is Sanjay Mehrotra, the Indian American who shaped semiconductor giant Micron?
description: At the top of this semiconductor giant is Sanjay Mehrotra, an Indian-origin CEO whose journey is as remarkable as Micron’s rise from being rejected three times for a US student visa to leading a company powering the next generation of artificial intelligence.
content: Micron Technology is riding the global AI boom, emerging as one of the biggest beneficiaries of rising demand for advanced memory chips. At the top of this semiconductor giant is Sanjay Mehrotra, an Indian-origin CEO whose journey is as remarkable as... [2603 chars]

title: AI as your Doctor? Dos and Don’ts for Using AI as Healthcare
description: Understand the significance of artificial intelligence in healthcare decision-making and its influence on patient care and interactions.

title: Success of Maha-Vistaar led Centre to launch Bharat-Vistaar: Fadnavis
description: “the success of state’s unique maha-vistaar app, an application integrating artificial intelligence (ai) with agricultural practices has prompted the union government to adopt this application at national-level through bharat-vistaar app,” said chief minister devendra fadnavis on friday at vanamati. he was speaking at the inaugural ‘ranjitbabu deshmukh gram vikas puraskar - 2026,’ organised by rd foundation to celebrate 80th birthday of ranjit deshmukh, former maharashtra minister of ruarl development.
content:
Devendra Fadnavis felicitating Ranjit Deshmukh and Roopa Deshmukh. Chandrashekhar Bawankule, Jaikumar Gore, Dr Ashish Deshmukh, Anil Deshmukh, Ashok Dhote, Sunita Gawande, and Sandhya Gotmare also are seen. (Pic by Satish Raut)
